Who We Are

A Premier Provider of Integrated Solutions

The One Construction and Engineering Co., Ltd. specializes in delivering high-quality infrastructure, industrial, and architectural projects across Thailand. Driven by engineering excellence and a commitment to precision, we exceed client expectations through advanced technology and professional expertise.

Operating as a one-stop construction solution, we self-manage every layer of a project — from initial survey and design through to structural completion and utility systems — ensuring seamless quality control at every stage.

What We Do

4 Core Pillars
of Excellence

End-to-end project execution — from consultancy and survey to structural completion and utility systems — all under one roof.

01
Building & Industrial Construction

Full-cycle construction of commercial, residential, and industrial facilities.

  • Commercial & office buildings
  • Warehouses & factories
  • High-rise structures
  • Landscaping & site works
02
Civil Engineering & Infrastructure

Heavy earthworks, road construction, and large-scale infrastructure works.

  • Asphalt Concrete road paving
  • Reinforced concrete roads
  • Land grading & earthworks
  • Rock/concrete breaking
03
Piping & Utility Systems

Industrial fluid integration, sanitary engineering, and water management.

  • HDPE pipe welding & installation
  • PPR pipe systems
  • Water supply & drainage
  • Industrial fluid routing
04
Technical & Engineering Consultancy

Design, surveying, BOQ estimation, and project cost management.

  • Architectural & structural design
  • Field survey & boundary mapping
  • Bill of Quantities (BOQ)
  • Budget planning & estimation

The One-Stop Advantage

Why Choose The One?

Precise BOQ from Day One

Accurate Bill of Quantities upfront eliminates budget surprises and cost overruns throughout the project lifecycle.

Seamless Timeline Execution

A single dedicated team drives the project from foundation to final handover — no handoff delays between contractors.

Guaranteed Engineering Standards

All work performed under a unified engineering standard, controlled by real specialists — not subcontracted to unknown parties.

In-house Heavy Fleet

Owning world-class machinery (CAT, KOBELCO, KOMATSU, SAKAI) eliminates third-party dependency and keeps quality 100% in-house.

Traditional vs. The One
Factor Multiple Contractors THE ONE (Integrated)
Cost Control Inflated from repeated re-estimations Precise BOQ from day one
Time Efficiency Delays from inter-contractor handoffs One team from foundation to finish
Quality Assurance Inconsistent standards Uniform engineering standard
Accountability Blame diffused across parties Single point of responsibility
Heavy Machinery Fleet

Built to Handle Any Scale

We own and operate world-class heavy machinery, giving us full control over quality and scheduling without relying on third parties. From 1,800-rai earthwork projects to precision underground operations, our fleet is always ready to deploy.

Fleet Readiness
World-class brands: CAT, KOBELCO, KOMATSU, SAKAI — always maintained and mission-ready.
Heavy-Duty Execution
Large-scale earthworks, rock breaking, and complex underground excavation in challenging environments.
In-house Power
Eliminating third-party dependency means 100% control over timeline, cost, and quality on every project.

Our Commitment

Uncompromised Quality
& Safety

Build With Quality
Our DNA

"Build With Quality" is not just a slogan — it is the DNA of every step we take. From material selection to final inspection, quality is non-negotiable.

Precision
Engineering Excellence

Expert engineers control every critical checkpoint. We use advanced instrumentation for surveys and apply rigorous BOQ analysis to ensure precision across all phases.

Safety First
Zero Compromise

All personnel and site operations follow the highest safety standards. We deliver projects on time without ever compromising worker safety or site security.
